Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start txtInseridoComSucesso.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,30) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWCOOPERADOS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &PesSts = nullvalue(&PesSts) Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Clientes' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh txtInseridoComSucesso.Caption = '' &Mensagem.FromString(&WebSession.Get('TRNCLIENTE')) &WebSession.Remove('TRNCLIENTE') txtInseridoComSucesso.Caption = &Mensagem tbti.Visible = (&Mensagem <> '') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWCooperadosColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWCooperadosColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf PesCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible PesRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &gridPesFan.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible PesIsCli.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible &gridPesCidNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &CpfCnpj.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible RatNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible PesPrmFon.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &PesFonCon.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible PesUltVenDta.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PesCod.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.EXT, &PossuiModuloEXT) RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.AGRO_INSUMOS, &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = Cooperados.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PesCod) &groupCliente.Clear() &groupCliente.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &groupCliente.AddItem(1, 'Imprimir') &groupCliente.AddItem(2, 'Outros End.') &groupCliente.AddItem(3, 'Ref./Anexos') &groupCliente.AddItem(4, 'Produtos Vendido') &groupCliente.AddItem(5, 'Histórico Cliente') If (&PossuiModuloEXT = 'S') &groupCliente.AddItem(6, 'Extintores') Endif If (&PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S') &groupCliente.AddItem(7, 'Propriedades') Endif &groupCliente.AddItem(8, 'Excluir Pessoa') &groupCliente.AddItem(9, 'Associação') &gridPesFan = iif(PesFan.Length() > 30, Substr(PesFan,1, 30) + '...', PesFan) &gridPesCidNom = PesCidUfeCod.Trim() +' / '+ PesCidNom.Trim() If PesTip = 'J' //JURIDICA &CpfCnpj = PesCnpj Else &CpfCnpj = PesCpf EndIF RetornaPrimeiroContato.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, &PesFonCon) &gridPesCidNom.Link = ViewCidade.Link(EmpCod, PesCidCod, '') PesCod.ColumnClass = iif(PesSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO, !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm WWColumnDanger WWColumnDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn hidden-xs hidden-sm') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PesRaz.Link = VerCliente.Link('WWCliente', EmpCod, PesCod) EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWCooperadosColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &groupCliente.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &groupCliente = 1 Do 'Do ImprimirCadastro' Case &groupCliente = 2 Do 'Do OutrosEndere' Case &groupCliente = 3 Do 'Do Referencias' Case &groupCliente = 4 Do 'Do ProdutosCliente' Case &groupCliente = 5 Do 'Do Historico' Case &groupCliente = 6 Do 'Do Extintores' Case &groupCliente = 7 Do 'Do Propriedades' Case &groupCliente = 8 Do 'Do ExcluirCliente' Case &groupCliente = 9 Do 'Do Associacao' EndCase &groupCliente = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cooperados.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(PesCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoPequisaFone' wpPesquisaFone.Popup(&PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoListagemClientes' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpListagemCooperados.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesCod", '', !'Código', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesRaz", '', !'Razão Social', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesFan", '', !'Fantasia', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesIsCli", '', !' Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&gridPesCidNom", '', !'UF/Cidade', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&CpfCnpj", '', !'Cpf/Cnpj', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"RatNom", '', !'Ramo Ativ.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesPrmFon", '', !'Fone', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&PesFonCon", '', !'Contato', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PesUltVenDta", '', !'Ult.Compra', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWCooperadosColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf1.Visible = False &RatCod1.Visible = False &RatNom1.Visible = False &PesCidCod1.Visible = False &PesCidNom1.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = False &PesFan1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf2.Visible = False &RatCod2.Visible = False &RatNom2.Visible = False &PesCidCod2.Visible = False &PesCidNom2.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = False &PesFan2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &PesCpf3.Visible = False &RatCod3.Visible = False &RatNom3.Visible = False &PesCidCod3.Visible = False &PesCidNom3.Visible = False &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = False &PesFan3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPesUltVenDta3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirCadastro' RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS005.Link(EmpCod, PesCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do OutrosEndere' ClienteEndereco.Popup(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Referencias' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, PesCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ProdutosCliente' wpProdutosCliente.Link(EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, PesCod, 'WWCLIENTE') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Historico' WWHistoricoCliente.Link(PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Extintores' Extintor.Popup(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, PesCod, '') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Propriedades' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWClientePropriedade.PopUp(PesCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirCliente' wpExcluirPessoa.Popup(EmpCod, PesCod) refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Associacao' wwAssociacao.Call(EmpCod, PesCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILTROPESRAZ" &FiltroPesRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESCOD" &PesCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESSTS" &PesSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PESISCLI" &PesIsCli.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' &PesCpf1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' &RatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' &RatNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' &PesCidCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' &PesCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' &PesCidUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' &PesFan1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' &PesUltVenDta1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PesUltVenDta_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWClienteColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILTROPESRAZ", "", not &FiltroPesRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &FiltroPesRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESCOD", "", not &PesCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESSTS", "", not &PesSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PESISCLI", "", not &PesIsCli.IsEmpty(), 0, &PesIsCli.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndiF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'RATNOM' AND not &RatNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta1.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'RATNOM' AND not &RatNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta2.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCPF' AND not &PesCpf3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCpf3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATCOD' AND not &RatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'RATNOM' AND not &RatNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &RatNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDCOD' AND not &PesCidCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDNOM' AND not &PesCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESCIDUFECOD' AND not &PesCidUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesCidUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESFAN' AND not &PesFan3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesFan3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PESULTVENDTA' AND not (&PesUltVenDta3.IsEmpty() AND &PesUltVenDta_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PesUltVenDta3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PesUltVenDta_To3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Cooperados" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
